description: A financial statement outlining the performance, contract value, and distribution details of an annuity investment account.

contract_holder.instruction: The full name of the primary owner or annuitant listed on the contract.

contract_number.instruction: The unique contract, policy, or account number identifying the annuity.

annuity_provider.instruction: The name of the insurance company or financial institution issuing the annuity statement.

statement_period.instruction: The date range covered by the statement, or the specific statement closing date.

current_contract_value.instruction: The total ending monetary value of the annuity contract for the current period, often labeled Ending Value or Account Balance.

distribution_amount.instruction: The dollar amount of any systematic or scheduled payout distributed during the period, if applicable.
